templates.title: Greeting
templates.body: Hi {name}! 👋 Thanks for reaching out. How can I help you today?

templates.title: Price info
templates.body: Here's the info you asked for: {item} is {price}. Ready stock — order before 3 PM and it ships today!

templates.title: Payment instructions
templates.body: You can pay by bank transfer ({bank} {account}) or e-wallet. Please send the receipt here once done and I'll process your order right away 🙏

templates.title: Order confirmed
templates.body: Order confirmed, {name}! 🎉 Summary: {order}. Total: {total}. We'll pack it today.

templates.title: Order shipped
templates.body: Good news {name} — your order is on the way! 🚚 Tracking number: {tracking}. You can track it on the courier's site.

templates.title: Follow up
templates.body: Hi {name}, just checking in — would you like to go ahead with your order? I can hold the stock for you until {date} 😊

templates.title: Thank you + review ask
templates.body: Thank you for shopping with us, {name}! 💚 If you're happy with your order, a short review would mean a lot. See you next time!

templates.title: Out of stock
templates.body: So sorry {name}, that item just sold out 😔 We expect a restock around {date} — want me to message you the moment it's back?

templates.title: Outside chat hours
templates.body: Thanks for your message! Our chat hours are 9 AM–6 PM. We'll reply first thing when we're back 😊
